Hacknet.label: APWorld, Client
Hacknet.notes:
PointClicker checks don't work properly (but are still obtainable), RAM limits don't apply properly, and some missions do not send checks. 
The latter two issues can be addressed by save reloading, though - allowing the world to be beatable.
One of the checks might not be obtainable because of the vanilla game's weird requirements to spawn the mission.

Unfair Flips.label: APWorld, Client Mod, Discord Thread
Unfair Flips.notes: Playable and very feature complete, but still occasionally being worked on. No major issues.

Valheim.label: Github Releases
Valheim.notes: The .apworld file is inside the zip file

Vintage Story.label: Releases + Setup Instructions
Vintage Story.notes: Untested and very early access, don't bring to public games

Voltorb Flip (from Pokémon HG & SS).label: Github Releases
Voltorb Flip (from Pokémon HG & SS).notes: Very silly little thing, only a handful of checks and all items are filler

West of Loathing.label: Github Releases
West of Loathing.notes: Playable, but early alpha, expect bugs and logic issues and other weirdness

Word Search.label: APWorld, Client
Word Search.notes: Has some logic bugs, currently playable

Wordipelago.label: APWorld, Client
Wordipelago.notes: Often a slow starter, but gets rolling reasonably well

XCOM 2: War of the Chosen.label: Github Releases
XCOM 2: War of the Chosen.notes: Roughly 15-20h campaign with default settings, potentially much shorter with alternate goals.

Xenoblade Chronicles X.label: Github Releases
Xenoblade Chronicles X.notes: Early state, has logic issues, game is very long

Yacht Dice Bliss.label: Github Releases
Yacht Dice Bliss.notes: Beta version of Yacht Dice with new features

Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom.label: APWorld, Client
Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom.notes: Only contains up to the second boss of the game

Yoku's Island Express.label: Releases
Yoku's Island Express.notes: Playable, occasionally crashes. See its thread in the future-game-design channel.

Yooka-Laylee.label: Github Releases
Yooka-Laylee.notes: Check the future game design channel to see if there's a newer version

Ys I Chronicles.label: Github Releases, Setup Guide
Ys I Chronicles.notes: Has major issues with items locking out checks, requiring a lot of use of send_location
